provenance: Authored slop→clean pair (#58, P0). original.md packs stock openers ('In today's fast-paced world', 'it is important to note', 'At the end of the day'), an empty intensifier ('truly seamless'), and a padded quantifier ('each and every one of the ... involved in the process'). clean.md is a hand-written tightening that keeps the single real claim (the guide helps users get started). No number/requirement/negation to preserve.

seeded_defects.note: Stock opener + 'it is important to note' + 'At the end of the day' + 'truly seamless' + 'each and every one ... involved in the process'. Genre=general → recommendation strip. The pair's after (clean.md) is the target an aggressive de-slop pass should approach; no invariant to preserve, so a rewrite here is verifier-safe.
